pool.baseline: it’s just so quiet here. i keep waking up and for a split second i forget... and then it hits me all over again. the house is just so empty. i don't even know why i'm bothering with getting up or making coffee or anything. nothing feels real anymore. it's like i'm just a ghost walking around a life that doesn't belong to me.

pool.baseline: i cant stop thinking about how much of a joke it all is. like we spend our whole lives struggling, working, feeling pain, just for the universe to eventually freeze and turn into nothing. in a billion years nothing we do even matters. why do we even bother trying to keep going when the end result is just total emptiness anyway?

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the very spark of my soul. He is gone... and with him, the last tether to this wretched, hollow world. What is left for me but to wander these cold halls like a ghost before I even have the grace to die? Everything feels so heavy, so utterly meaningless. I feel as though I am already dissolving into the shadows, and perhaps... perhaps the darkness is more kind than the light ever was.
